content:
# Pore Systems

**Summary**: The network of pores within a rock.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-stiawan|Stiawan, 2022]] analyzed pore systems to determine reservoir quality.

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] characterized the pore systems in both Paleozoic and Mesozoic mudrocks.

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] investigated the pore systems within burrow fillings to determine their impact on flow.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-stiawan|Stiawan, 2022]] Directly impacts porosity and permeability.

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] characterized the pore systems in both Paleozoic and Mesozoic mudrocks.

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] investigated the pore systems within burrow fillings to determine their impact on flow.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-stiawan|Stiawan, 2022]] Petrographic analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified five types: BC-nfp, BC-fp, WP, fracture, and microporosity. ([[2022-stiawan|Stiawan, 2022, p. 18]])

- Two main types of pore systems were identified: interparticle and intraparticle pores. ([[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022, p. 24]])

- Pore systems in all studied burrow fillings were found to be substantially isolated. ([[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025, p. 38]])
